title: Challenge Advancements
description: A collection of custom advancements achievable in the mid to late-game, complete with unique reward items.
body:
This Datapack adds thirteen advancements (two of which are hidden).

The advancements can be found in-game under the 'Challenge Advancements' tab with the green book: 

![A screenshot of the 'Challenge Advancements' tab in-game. Accessed by pressing L by default.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8773f20a6b19fe4fa3b023fce697b4eefdab9e50.png)

Each advancement comes with a reward banner as a sort of trophy, these banners are not craftable in vanilla survival due to having more than six layers. 

![A screenshot of all the Reward Banners in-game; the A Jack Of All Trees banner depicts a tree with a gnarled twisting truck, the Dedicated Gardener banner depicts vines with splashes of colour, the Bow Before Me banner depicts a sun emblem and a grey background with gold stitches, The Nether's Champion banner is a design invoking flames, The Ocean's Champion banner depicts a Turtle Shell underwater, the For The Record banner depicts a Music Disc designed not to look like any particular in-game disc, the Smited banner depicts Lightning, the Knight of the Realm banner depicts a shield with a golden metal centre, the All-terrain Expert banner attempts to incorporate it's four relevant environments, the Titan Slayer banner depicts a dark monster breaking through a stone wall, the Indiana Jones banner Depicts what is best described as a temple in a forest and finally, the Being Sneaky Are You banner depicts a white potion particle on a blue background.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54cb01560cf0ba89c128a6a23fec3e49b81f8361.png)

The reward for the 'An Acquired Taste' advancement is a Bundle containing Music Discs with songs which you can't normally play in a jukebox in Survival. (including Alpha, Chrysopoeia, Dragon Fish, Wet Hands, pokopoko & more).
Due to technical limitations I can't put each individual song on it's own disc.
This Datapack uses the jukebox_song experimental setting, any custom Music Discs lose their sound events (which is what makes them play different songs) when the Datapack is uninstalled. 

![This image is showing off the various custom music discs granted as a reward for completing the 'An Acquired Taste' Advancement.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1026b9c99000de9e1b8002bb2baa9fc3def92f5c.png)

## Roadmap:
- Backport at least as far back as 1.18

## List of all advancements not hidden:
![A screenshot of all not hidden Advancements added by this Datapack. (Text version below.)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3ddee3865f1bd8fb863310a544c697c37d7e84f.png)
### Text Version with Extra Details:
> **"Challenge Advancements" - A collection of custom advancements by Haunted_Magma & TheButterflyKing**
> The root advancement. It's granted when the player picks up or drops any item.
 
> **"Indiana Jones" - Explore every naturally generated structure**
> Structures treated like Features, like Desert Wells & Monster Rooms, don't count towards this advancement.

> **"For The Record!" - Collect all Music Discs acquirable by getting a Skeleton to shoot a Creeper**

> **"An Acquired Taste" - Listen to every Music Disc**
> Thanks to ioblackshaw of the Minecraft Commands Discord server for help with this advancement's reward item as well as everything in the jukebox_song file.

> **"All-Terrain Expert" - Use Leather Boots to walk on Powder Snow, breathe longer while swiming underwater with a Turtle Shell, walk on Soul Sand unhindered with the Soul Speed enchantment, wear gold armour to convince Piglins you're worth keeping around & avoid burning your feet on a Magma Block with the Frost Walker enchantment.**
> This advancement references armour pieces & enchantments that are useful in specific situations, like how Leather Boots help with Powder Snow & Gold armour pacifies Piglins.

> **"A Jack Of All Trees" - Collect one of every Sapling, Mushroom & Fungi**
> This advancement's title references the saying 'A jack of all trades but master of none.'

> **"Dedicated Gardener" - Collect every type of flower**
> This advancement completes with either a Dandelion or Golden Dandelion & an open or closed Eyeblossom.

> **"Titan Slayer" - Slay all Bosses & Mini-Bosses**
> The five Mobs that need to be killed for this advancement are: The Ender Dragon, The Wither, a Warden, an Elder Guardian & a Ravager.

> **"Knight of the Realm" - Ride a Horse whilst wearing a full set of Iron armour & wielding an Iron Sword or Spear & a Shield, & don't forget your steed's Iron Horse Armour**
> This advancement completes with any mount wearing Iron Horse Armour, not just horses.

> **"The Nether's Champion" - Ride a Happy Ghast & equip yourself with a full set of golden armour enchanted with Fire Protection IV, Soul Speed III Boots, a Fire Aspect II Golden Sword & a Flame Bow**

> **"The Ocean's Champion" - Wear a Turtle Shell & Depth Strider III Boots, whilst wielding a Riptide III enchanted Trident, & under the effect of Breath of the Nautilus, Dolphins Grace & Conduit Power** Thanks to dragonmaster95 of the Minecraft Commands Discord server for helping make this advancement work as intended.

> **"Bow Before Me" - Acquire a full set of fully enchanted Netherite armour & Elytra, a Totem of Undying & fully enchanted Channelling Trident & Density Mace**
> This advancement completes with any combination of the mutually exclusive armour enchantments.


<details>
<summary>Hidden Advancements (Spoilers)</summary>

![Hidden Advancement, "Smited" With a banner depicting Lightning as it's Icon.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cfe1d1eb53c153060f3e93f0535fa0dd2f25975.png)
> **"Smited" - You were just struck by lightning...**
 This advancement is granted when lightning strikes within three blocks of the player. Channeling Tridents & Lightning Rods count.

![Hidden Advancement, "Being Sneaky Are You?" With a Potion of Invisibility as it's Icon.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a242dc6ff08407417ebf091f76b1b2cceb649fcb.png)
> **"Being Sneaky Are You?" - Drink a Potion of Invisibility**
 This advancement does not announce to chat when a player completes it.
</details>
